# Internal Contacts & Support Directory

This page lists primary contact addresses for engineering and support functions.
All addresses are hosted on acmecorp.com unless otherwise noted.

## Engineering Contacts

**Jane Doe** — Platform Engineering Lead
Email: jane.doe@acmecorp.com
Slack: @jane-doe
Availability: Monday–Friday, 09:00–18:00 PST

Jane Doe is the first point of contact for platform reliability questions and
capacity planning requests. For urgent incidents outside business hours, page
via PagerDuty rather than emailing jane.doe@acmecorp.com directly.

**Bob Smith** — Engineering Manager
Email: bob.smith@acmecorp.com
Slack: @bob-smith

Bob Smith handles escalations that cross team boundaries. If you need budget
approval or headcount decisions, bob.smith@acmecorp.com is the right address.
Bob covers the Pacific timezone and is generally reachable by 08:00 PST.

## Support & Shared Inboxes

For general technical support queries, use the shared inbox at
support@acmecorp.com. This inbox is monitored during business hours by a
rotating on-call engineer. Response SLA is four hours for P2 issues and one
hour for P1 incidents.

Do not send credentials or secret material to support@acmecorp.com. For
security disclosures, use the dedicated security alias instead.

## Domain Notes

All internal services run under the acmecorp.com domain. External partners
who need to allowlist our sending infrastructure should whitelist the entire
acmecorp.com domain rather than individual hostnames. SPF and DKIM records
are published at the root of acmecorp.com.

If you receive email purporting to be from acmecorp.com but failing DMARC
checks, forward it to support@acmecorp.com with the original headers attached.
